_comment: Golden cases for the REVIEW workflow (privacy -> draft -> fairness). Each prompt is the ReviewContextInput JSON as text; the privacy_node parses it. Grade with: agents-cli eval grade --metrics review_quality. Requires root_agent = review_workflow when generating.

parts.text: {"employee": {"role_title": "Frontend Engineer", "alias": "the employee"}, "period": "2026-Q2", "goals": [{"id": "g1", "title": "Lead the design-system tooltip consolidation"}], "role_expectations": ["Ownership of outcomes", "Collaboration across the team"], "company_values": ["Own It", "Work in the Grey"], "evidence": [{"id": "ev_anna_1", "summary": "Refactored the shared tooltip component and helped Mark integrate it in billing", "impact": "Closed two layout bugs", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Own It", "goal_id": "g1", "quality_score": 0.86}, {"id": "ev_anna_2", "summary": "Introduced a visual regression check in the frontend CI pipeline", "impact": "Caught 4 regressions before release", "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": "Own It", "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 0.82}, {"id": "peer:pr_anna_1", "summary": "Peer review - Collaboration (5/5): pair-programmed on the billing refactor and unblocked a tricky layout bug", "impact": null, "period": "2026-Q2", "company_value": null, "goal_id": null, "quality_score": 1.0}]}
